note: Do not instantiate directly; use itasca.block.contact module functions.

methods.name: area
methods.description: Get surface area of a contact.

methods.name: b1
methods.description: Get block 1 at a contact.

methods.name: b2
methods.description: Get block 2 at a contact.

methods.name: energy_fric
methods.description: Get the frictional energy dissipated at a contact.

methods.name: energy_strain_comp
methods.description: Get the compressive strain energy for the contact.

methods.name: energy_strain_shear
methods.description: Get the shear strain energy at a contact.

methods.name: energy_strain_tensile
methods.description: Get the tensile strain energy at a contact.

methods.name: energy_strain_total
methods.description: Get the total strain energy at a contact.

methods.name: extra
methods.description: Get the contact extra data in the given slot.

methods.name: fb1
methods.description: Get face block 1 associated with the contact.

methods.name: fb2
methods.description: Get face block 2 associated with the contact.

methods.name: fid
methods.description: Get the DFN fracture ID number at a contact.

methods.name: flowplane
methods.description: Get the flow plane associated with a contact.

methods.name: group
methods.description: Get the contact group name in a given slot.

methods.name: group_remove
methods.signature: contact.group_remove(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> bool
methods.description: Remove from the given group from all group slots of the contact. One argument of type string, giving the group name, is required. The return value is a bool which is True if the group was removed from any slot, otherwise False.

methods.name: groups
methods.description: Get a dictionary describing which groups this contact is part of. The keys of the dictionary are the slot names and the values are the group names.

methods.name: id
methods.description: Get the contact id.

methods.name: in_group
methods.signature: contact.in_group(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> bool
methods.description: Test if the contact is part of a given group. If the optional argument slot is given, only that slot is searched. Otherwise, all group slots are searched.

methods.name: index
methods.description: Get the index (offset) for the block contact.

methods.name: is_excavated
methods.description: Get excavated flag of the contact.

methods.name: is_hidden
methods.description: Get hidden flag of the contact.

methods.name: jset
methods.description: Get the joint set ID for the contact.

methods.name: normal
methods.description: Get the contact contact normal vector (vector).

methods.name: normal_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the contact contact normal vector.

methods.name: normal_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the contact contact normal vector.

methods.name: normal_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the contact contact normal vector.

methods.name: pos
methods.description: Get the contact contact position (vector).

methods.name: pos_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the contact contact position.

methods.name: pos_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the contact contact position.

methods.name: pos_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the contact contact position.

methods.name: set_extra
methods.description: Set the contact extra data in the given slot.

methods.name: set_group
methods.signature: contact.set_group(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> None
methods.description: Set the contact group name in a given slot.

methods.name: subcontacts
methods.description: Get subcontact list of a block.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Get contact type.

methods.name: valid
methods.description: Returns True if this contact is live.
